title: Application of time-frequency domain and deep learning fusion feature in non-invasive diagnosis of congenital heart disease-related pulmonary arterial hypertension
author: Ma, Ge, et al.

steps.title: Feature extraction
steps.instruction: For the specific situation of limited samples, a fusion feature including time domain features, frequency domain features, and deep features obtained by deep learning is proposed in feature extraction. Not only the time-frequency domain features of the entire cardiac cycle will be extracted by us, but the time-frequency domain features of S2 will also be extracted. Because clinical auscultation found that the pathological features of congenital heart disease-related pulmonary arterial hypertension were concentrated in S2.
